name: Web Portal Credential Capture - Cloned Login Page Detection
description: Detects web portal credential capture via credential harvesting frameworks: EvilGinx2, GoPhish, SET, Modlishka, and King-Phisher. Monitors for tool execution on endpoints.
query: process where event.type == "start" and (process.name : ("evilginx*", "gophish*", "modlishka*") or process.args : ("*evilginx*", "*gophish*", "*setoolkit*", "*credential_harvester*", "*modlishka*", "*king-phisher*"))
